response.justification: Candidate has 13+ years of solid software engineering experience with strong full-stack credentials and recent exposure to MCP and agentic workflow tooling at re:cinq. However, the resume lacks demonstrated depth in core requirements for this Staff GenAI role: no explicit experience with vector databases, RAG architectures, LLM evaluation pipelines, or multi-agent frameworks like LangGraph/CrewAI. AI work appears recent (under a year) rather than the 8+ years of production AI delivery the role requires. Strong engineering fundamentals and craftsmanship culture make them worth a screening call to probe actual GenAI depth.
strengths: 13+ years building production systems across web, mobile, embedded with TypeScript/Node.js core stack matching JD
Recent hands-on with MCP code generators and agentic workflow frameworks at re:cinq
Demonstrated technical leadership via workshops, talks, mentoring, and open-source platform ownership (GISCollective)
concerns: No explicit RAG, vector database, or LLM evaluation/observability experience listed
Production AI delivery appears to be ~1 year, far short of the 8+ years required
No mention of major cloud AI platforms (Bedrock, Vertex AI, Azure OpenAI) or customer-facing FDE/consulting delivery

key_factors.factor: Insufficient depth in RAG/vector DBs/LLM ops
Strong general engineering tenure and craftsmanship
Recent MCP and agentic tooling exposure
